recentGovernance: Ghost Creator — AutoRepair Shop (Ridgemark Property Services)

tiers.name: Spark
tiers.scope: A rapid single-page site — portfolio, landing, microsite

tiers.name: Business
tiers.scope: Multi-page site with booking, contact flows, blog

tiers.name: Store
tiers.scope: E-commerce with Stripe, cart, inventory basics

tiers.name: Custom App
tiers.scope: Django + React custom application, with 3 client sign-off gates

processes.website: Discovery → Design → Build → Review → Launch → Maintenance
processes.app: Discovery → Architecture → UX Prototype (Gate 1 signoff) → Backend → API → Frontend MVP (Gate 2 signoff) → Integration → Production readiness → Deploy → Marketing site (Gate 3 signoff, Launch)

stack.websites: Astro 5 + Cloudflare Pages + D1 + R2 + Tailwind v4
stack.apps: Django + PostgreSQL + React, deployed on Fly.io (default) or Hetzner

differentiators.label: Automated design-direction pipeline
differentiators.detail: Every brand questionnaire auto-generates three direction candidates (typography + palette + layout) for the client to pick — prevents the "AI-slop" sameness most builders produce.

differentiators.label: Three-gate app workflow
differentiators.detail: Custom apps ship through Prototype / MVP / Launch gates with explicit client sign-off at each — no surprise at handoff.

differentiators.label: Self-serve client portal
differentiators.detail: Clients approve gates, request content edits, annotate screenshots, restart app services, and file incidents directly — no support ticket ping-pong for routine things.

differentiators.label: 10-agent governance review
differentiators.detail: Every project is reviewed by specialized agents (Ghost User, Ghost Creator, Stack Optimiser, Software Dev, Marketing Exec, Portal Customer, and more) before and during delivery — a structured quality check, not a vibe-check.

differentiators.label: Hand-coded, client-owned
differentiators.detail: No WordPress, no page builder, no vendor lock-in. Clients get the code, the repo, the domain. If UWC disappeared, they could hire anyone.
